title: Reviewer suggestions stay local git intelligence
summary: Kage reviewers borrows Repowise style reviewer suggestions using only local git history and Kage graph signals: authorship on target files, recent edits, and primary owners of co change partner files. It does not call Gi
body:
Kage reviewers borrows Repowise-style reviewer suggestions using only local git history and Kage graph signals: authorship on target files, recent edits, and primary owners of co-change partner files. It does not call GitHub or store external account state, keeping Kage repo-local and memory-first.
Verified by: npm test --prefix mcp; node mcp/dist/cli.js reviewers --project . --targets mcp/kernel.ts --json
